report.summary: Cycle v8 — altcoin ETF guide + tracker shipped (2 new pages, 19 ETF rows, full SEO stack); design polished 5 pages with breadcrumbs + OG images; redeploy pending for new pages; Sprint 59 apostrophe blocker and rate-limiting gap persist.

sections.title: QA
items: ✅ NEW this cycle: /learn/altcoin-etf-guide-2026 and /tools/altcoin-etf-tracker both have page.tsx — scaffolded correctly, added to published-pages.ts

✅ Design polish cycle verified: gamification, courses, notifications, portfolio-tracker — Breadcrumb component added to all 4 (was missing), OG images created for notifications + portfolio-tracker, server-side metadata exported for notifications + portfolio-tracker pages

🔴 CARRY-OVER: Sprint 59 build 1b4a15e still FAILED — AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 unescaped apostrophe in single-quoted string ('you're' → needs ' or curly quote); 1-line fix unblocks ecosystem/courses routes
🔴 57 TS errors across 2 files — unchanged from v7: AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 errors) + structured-data.examples.ts (40 errors); no new error sources introduced this cycle

⚠️ CARRY-OVER: 100/295 published slugs missing page.tsx — pre-existing dynamic [slug] route architecture, no regression; total published slug count grew from 292→295 (+2 new ETF pages + 1 count correction)
✅ next.config.ts safety net stable: ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, output:standalone — build proceeds despite TS errors

sections.title: Data Pipeline
items: ✅ All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: /api/prices (60s TTL), /api/fear-greed (600s), /api/trending (300s), /api/market-metrics (60s), /api/market-dominance (300s), /api/defi-yields (300s)
✅ Ops routes /api/health and /api/cache-stats confirmed live — health route has checkRateLimit, cache-stats has 5-req limit

⚠️ CARRY-OVER: TTL mismatches persist on 4/6 routes — fear-greed (s-maxage=600 / revalidate=1200), trending (300/600), market-metrics (60/120), defi-yields (dynamic/dynamic); CDN may over-serve stale, no user-facing impact detected

🔴 CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting 0/6 public data routes — /api/health and /api/cache-stats are the only rate-limited endpoints; all live data APIs (prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields) unprotected; risk rises as organic traffic grows
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data coverage 2/6 routes — market-dominance (FALLBACK_DATA defined, 4 refs) and prices (partial, 1 ref); 4 routes fully unprotected on upstream API failure
✅ No rate limit hits, stale-cascade events, or upstream API failures detected this cycle — data pipeline clean

sections.title: DevOps
items: ⚠️ ACTION REQUIRED: Altcoin ETF guide + tracker (2 new pages) created at 20:25–20:28 — AFTER last Vercel redeploy (Ede7aPH2k at ~19:10). Pages are in published-pages.ts but NOT yet live on production. New redeploy needed.
🔴 CARRY-OVER: Sprint 59 build 1b4a15e still FAILED in Vercel — ecosystem + courses routes not live in production; awaiting 1-line apostrophe fix in AICourseRecommendations.tsx
✅ next.config.ts confirmed stable: trailingSlash:true, ignoreBuildErrors:true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency:4, workerThreads:false, output:standalone

✅ middleware.ts clean: 127 lines, single import (next/server), Edge Runtime compliant; pillar pages set (50 pages) unchanged — new ETF pages not designated as pillar pages, will receive standard 12hr CDN cache
⚠️ URGENT: Vercel Pro trial ~5 days remaining (was ~6 in v7, countdown confirms linear decay) — payment method must be added before expiry to avoid production downgrade to Hobby tier
✅ No new deployment failures, error spikes, or performance regressions detected this cycle

sections.title: Project Manager
items: ✅ SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: /learn/altcoin-etf-guide-2026 (3,400 words, 14-min read, Article + FAQ + BreadcrumbList schema, 7 target keywords); /tools/altcoin-etf-tracker (19 ETF rows, SOL/XRP/ETH asset tabs, sortable AUM/flows/fees/staking columns, staking-only toggle, search)

✅ SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Design polish — Breadcrumb added to gamification, courses, notifications, portfolio-tracker; OG images created for notifications + portfolio-tracker; server-side metadata exported for both

✅ SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Community — Babylon Protocol fire post queued, Altcoin ETF launch tweets drafted, DeFAI 6-post thread drafted, Thursday newsletter updated with 9 new pages, 3 social cards created
📊 PUBLISHED PAGES: 295 total (up from 292 in v7); PUBLISH_QUEUE: 0 (still empty)
🔴 BLOCKER #1 (Jefe action): Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 — change 'you're' in single-quoted string to {"you're"} or ' — 1-line fix unblocks Sprint 59 (176 dApps + courses hub)
🔴 BLOCKER #2 (DevOps action): Trigger Vercel redeploy now to push altcoin-etf-guide-2026 + altcoin-etf-tracker live — pages built, in published-pages.ts, SEO-ready, just need deploy
⚠️ BLOCKER #3 (Jefe action): Add Vercel payment method within 5 days — Pro trial expiry is production risk
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Rate limiting 0/6 public data routes — sprint needed before organic traffic window opens
⚠️ CARRY-OVER: Fallback data 2/6 routes — resilience sprint deferred again
📌 NEXT CYCLE PLAN: (1) Trigger redeploy for ETF pages, (2) unblock Sprint 59 with 1-line fix, (3) rate-limiting sprint for /api/* routes, (4) content queue refill — research new topics for next batch
